2604.00801.title: Routing-Free Mixture-of-Experts
2604.00801.paper_summary: Standard Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) models rely on centralized routing mechanisms that introduce rigid inductive biases. We propose Routing-Free MoE which eliminates any hard-coded centralized designs including external routers, Softmax, Top-K and load balancing, instead encapsulating all activation functionalities within individual experts and directly optimized through continuous gradient flow, enabling each expert to determine its activation entirely on its own. We introduce a unified adaptive load-balancing framework to simultaneously optimize both expert-balancing and token-balancing objectives through a configurable interpolation, allowing flexible and customizable resource allocation. Extensive experiments show that Routing-Free MoE can consistently outperform baselines with better scalability and robustness. We analyze its behavior in detail and offer insights that may facilitate future MoE design ad optimization.
2604.00801.paper_summary_zh: 標準的專家混合模型（MoE）依賴於集中式路由機制，這引入了僵硬的歸納偏見。<lb/>我們提出了無路由MoE，消除了任何硬編碼的集中式設計，包括外部路由器、Softmax、Top-K和負載平衡，而是將所有激活功能封裝在各個專家內部，並通過連續的梯度流直接優化，使每個專家能夠完全自主地決定其激活。<lb/>我們引入了一個統一的自適應負載平衡框架，通過可配置的插值同時優化專家平衡和令牌平衡目標，允許靈活和可自定義的資源分配。<lb/>大量實驗表明，無路由MoE在可擴展性和穩健性方面始終能超越基準。<lb/>我們詳細分析其行為，並提供見解，以促進未來MoE的設計和優化。
2604.00801.author: Yilun Liu et.al.
2604.00801.authors: Yilun Liu, Jinru Han, Sikuan Yan, Volker Tresp, Yunpu Ma
